lifecycleScripts.afterStart: npx wp-env run cli -- wp option update blogname 'Power Course E2E' && npx wp-env run cli -- wp option update blogdescription 'E2E Testing Site' && npx wp-env run cli -- wp rewrite structure '/%postname%/' && npx wp-env run cli -- wp rewrite flush && npx wp-env run cli -- wp language core install zh_TW && npx wp-env run cli -- wp site switch-language zh_TW
